summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Water Watch UK subscription system. All core subscription features working correctly including feature gating, paywall integration, and API endpoints.

minor_issues.issue: Cannot fully test authenticated user dropdown upgrade button due to OAuth dependency
minor_issues.affected_flow: User dropdown menu when signed in
minor_issues.workaround: Manual testing required for complete OAuth flow

passed_tests: Subscription context works (free tier by default)
AI Safety Insight shows PRO badge for free users
Subscription status endpoint returns 401 for unauthenticated
Subscription feature check endpoint works correctly
Paywall dialog opens and displays pricing plans
AI insights properly gated behind PRO tier
Basic API endpoints functioning (stations, bathing waters, flood warnings)
Backend subscription feature access control working
Paywall shows monthly (£3) and yearly (£30) plans with correct savings
